warning_refresh_page: The generator looks better on mobile and Linux than on Windows. You have to reload the page until a check appears on the date.
rank_explanation_text: Rank is calculated exactly from your TruckersMP registration date. Paste your data below to get your real rank.
tooltipMessage: This license is a joke and a nod to the community, not intended to be professional.
infoTooltip:
Meaning of elements:
- Ranks: The rank is calculated based on the TruckersMP account's age. Each year of seniority equals one rank level, up to a maximum of 12 years.
- Epic TAG: The options are unlocked based on your seniority. You can select your current rank or any lower rank.
- Gold star (✵) next to name: Indicates that you are the verified owner of the VTC.
- Silver stars (★) on the right: A nod to the extinct VTC Convoy Nocturno.
- Checkmark (✓) next to date: Indicates the date is from a reliable online source. Refresh the page to try fetching the date online again.
- Cross (✗) next to date: Indicates the date is local, not verified. Refresh the page to try fetching the date online again.
verification_intro:
To verify your account and get your real Rank:
1. Enter your TruckersMP ID above.
2. Click the 'Get Verification Data' button (opens a new tab).
3. Copy all the text from that new tab.
4. Paste it into the box below.
verification_invalid: Invalid data (make sure to copy all text)
verification_mismatch: Data does not match the ID entered above.
